# Unified Gameplay Transcript

Loops are split by the in-game bells. Within each loop, the timestamp shown is **real recording time elapsed since the bells of the previous loop** (MM:SS, or H:MM:SS once an hour has passed).  When a loop spans a session break and the GM restarts the loop at the top of the next recording, the clock resets to 0:00 (matching the GM's in-game minute counter) and a divider notes the restart.


## Loop 1

*Starts at: Night 1 [00:01:05] — First in-game scene (no prior bell)*


**— Night 1 recording at [00:01:15] —**

[00:10] Holli: Grace vanished in 1938, not long after moving to town.
[00:14] Holli: The following year, her worried sister came looking for her and disappeared as well.
[00:19] Holli: Their parents never gave up hope, but neither daughter was ever seen again alive or dead.
[00:25] Holli: You are here in the village of Glamis to see if you can find out what happened to them.
[00:30] Holli: The main entrance of the McKittrick is a pair of tall, heavy, windowless black doors with a raised sunray pattern radiating out from the centre.
[00:39] Holli: Inside, you find yourself in a long, narrow, low-lit hallway.
